_meta.notes: Updated in iter-009 M3: added M3 gaps for production/jobs/skills/forest/field/mine. G-LISTJOB and G-LISTSKILL updated.

gaps.description: Full building list (listBuildings.json) not found in extracted sources; only 4 buildings reconstructed from config.js references
listGoods.json not found in extracted sources; goods catalog is empty
basePrice is randomized at runtime; no static baseline extractable from sources
listJob.json not found; 7 jobs + builder stub reconstructed from home.js/config.js; exact maxStep/products are approximated (default maxStep=0.005, gap G-JOB-MAXSTEP). Real calibration M9.
listTechs.json not found in extracted sources; tech tree is empty skeleton
listZone.json not found; zones catalog is empty skeleton
listSkill.json not found; 2 approximated example skills added (woodworking, scholarship) for M3 system testing. Real skill list is M6.
Discrepancy: spoilage.cheese=0.08 in active config but baseSpoilage.cheese=0.10 in base config; may indicate a bug in the original

Exact job.maxStep and job.products quantities not extractable from listJob.json (missing). Default 0.005 approximated: completionUnits=maxStep*900*number; at eff=1 number=10 → 4 quarterDay/day × 10 = 40 curStep/day; completion in ~1.1 days. Real calibration M9.
Forester building, pollination service, animalGrowth tech bonuses omitted from forestRegen (forest.js:69,92,144). These modify tree/animal growth rates.
vegetableFarm.created=0 (no buildings in M3) → chanceOfRodents=0 → rodent mechanika fakticky vypnuta. Mechanika připravena, aktivuje se přidáním budov v M5.
eventMineExpander (mine.js) is a content event (M8). In M3 the trigger fires (RNG consumed) but the effect is a no-op with log entry.
builder job slot is a stub (noProduction=true). Building construction mechanics are M5.
Original home.js distributes work into sub-tasks randomly. M3 uses worker number directly (no sub-task distribution). Gap: G-JOB-TASKS M5.
population.total vs workerSlots sjednocení: M3 uses min(population.total, workerSlots) as available workers. Exact mapping (M5 labor market) deferred.
Original home.level (0..6 progression) mapped to settlementLevel proxy in M3. Area formulas (forest/field/mine) use settlementLevel as proxy. Precise mapping in M5.
workerEfficiency morale components (minWorkerPenalty, leaderMorality, entertainmentOffset, goodSpiritsBonus, workerMorale) all = 0 in M3 → workerEfficiency = constant 1. Full morale system M5.

2× step compensation for skills (stepCompensation=0.5, effMaxStep=maxStep/2). Architecture §4.3/§5.5 (K4) documents this. M9 calibration will finalize whether maxStep or maxStep/2 is the correct balance.
Skill onFull/onStart effects registry (skills.js:18) not implemented in M3. Only products are granted on completion. Full effects system M6.
Skill discovery (sector/tech prerequisites) not implemented in M3. All skills in catalog are discoverable by default. Full discovery system M6.
